title: New moms with morning sickness: 10 herbal remedies to ease symptoms
description: Ginkgo biloba tinctures have been used to help alleviate morning sickness in some pregnant women. The reason behind its effectiveness lies in its unique properties and constituents, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds help to relax blood vessels, improve blood flow to the brain, and reduce nausea and vomiting. The tannins and alkaloids present in Ginkgo biloba also have a sedative effect, which can help to calm the...
